context.role: Echo indicating hunger when food bowl is empty
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60 on perch, looking toward food bowl at x=16, y=100
context.usage_scenario: Triggered when food_level = 0; persists until food is provided; spawns speech bubble with seed icon

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with head turned toward food bowl, crest in normal position
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with no gradients; hand-drawn organic edges
visual_specification.outline: None; pure pixel art with color blocking

animation.description: Frame 1: looking at bowl, Frame 2: head tilted slightly more toward bowl, Frame 3: return to frame 1, Frame 4: slight body shift

visual_specification.details: Head rotated approximately 30 degrees toward food bowl (left side); eyes focused on bowl area; crest in normal 3-4px height; body remains on perch

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette and base structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_eating (looking vs actively eating), echo_idle (head turned vs forward)
